features.description: ChClient.query_table_dependencies() method queries system.tables for dependency info and returns HashMap<String, Vec<String>>

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -n 'pub async fn query_table_dependencies' src/clickhouse/client.rs | head -1
layers.fail_message: query_table_dependencies() method not found in client.rs

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: ChClient method requires live ClickHouse; verified by compilation + unit test for struct deserialization

layers.name: behavioral
layers.fail_message: Existing restore unit tests failed after restructuring

layers.name: runtime
layers.fail_message: Phased restore log patterns not found in restore output

features.description: CLAUDE.md updated for all modified modules (src/backup, src/restore, src/clickhouse)

layers.name: structural
layers.command: for m in src/backup src/restore src/clickhouse; do [ -f "$m/CLAUDE.md" ] && echo "EXISTS: $m" || echo "MISSING: $m"; done
layers.expected:
EXISTS: src/backup
EXISTS: src/restore
EXISTS: src/clickhouse
layers.fail_message: One or more CLAUDE.md files missing

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: for m in src/backup src/restore src/clickhouse; do grep -q 'Parent Context' "$m/CLAUDE.md" && grep -q 'Directory Structure' "$m/CLAUDE.md" && grep -q 'Key Patterns' "$m/CLAUDE.md" && grep -q 'Parent Rules' "$m/CLAUDE.md" || echo "FAIL: $m missing required sections"; done && echo VALID
layers.fail_message: CLAUDE.md missing required sections (Parent Context, Directory Structure, Key Patterns, Parent Rules)

alternative_verification.expected: non-zero count indicating new patterns are documented
